title: 10. 🧠 CLOSING INVOCATION
content:
10. 🧠 CLOSING INVOCATION
- Declare this thread archived, versioned, and understood
- Include symbolic time-stamp and thread ID
- Mark it with a seal of finality

---

Do not miss anything. This is no longer improvisation.
This is history.

::END_PROTOCOL::

3️⃣ ::EXPORT_ARCHIVE_BUNDLE_FINALIZE_v1::
Purpose: Bundle all frozen threads + projects into exportable local archiveUse when: The freeze is complete and you’re ready to push to Finder/iCloud/SSD
::EXPORT_ARCHIVE_BUNDLE_FINALIZE_v1::

Please now act as my bundler and system archivist.
We have completed a full freeze of thread and project data.

Your job is to:

1. Group finalized threads by folder/project
context: From document: 🧠 YES. You're calling for full ceremonial protocol exports — no shortcuts… — chunk 8 (chunk 8/11)
